functions.name: crystalball.crystalball.fill_correlations
documentation:
Expands single correlation produced by wsclean_predict to the
full set of correlations.

# Parameters

vis

: dask array of visibilities of shape {code}`(row, chan, 1)`

pol

: MS Polarisation dataset.

# Returns

vis

: dask array of visibilities of shape {code}`(row, chan, corr)`

functions.name: crystalball.filtering.select_field_id
documentation:
# Parameters

field_datasets : list of {class}`daskms.Dataset`

field

: if None, will try and return the only field in the MS.

  ```python
  select_field_id(field_ds, "PKS-1934")
  ```

# Returns

fields_id

: Selected field ID

functions.name: crystalball.filtering.filter_datasets
documentation:
# Parameters

datasets

: List of datasets representing partitions of the Measurement Set.
  Should be partitioned by FIELD_ID and DATA_DESC_ID at least

field_id

: List of valid fields

# Returns

datasets

: Filtered list of datasets

functions.name: crystalball.ms.ms_preprocess
documentation:
Adds output column if missing.

Returns
-------
ms_rows : int
    number of Measurement Set Rows

functions.name: crystalball.wsclean.import_from_wsclean
documentation:
Imports sources from wsclean, sorted from brightest to faintest.
If `include_regions` is specified only those sources within
are returned. Similarly if `num` is specified, `num` brightest
sources are returned.

# Parameters

wsclean_comp_list

: wsclean component list file.

include_regions

: List of valid region's. Only sources within these regions
  will be loaded.
  Defaults to `[]` in which case, all sources are loaded.

point_only

: Only include point sources. Defaults to False

num

: Number of sources to include.
  If `None` all sources are returned.

# Returns

source_type

: Source types of shape {code}`(source,)`

radec

: Source radec coordinates of shape {code}`(source, 2)`.

stokes

: Source stokes paramters of shape {code}`(source, 4)`.

spectral_index

: Spectral index of shape {code}`(source, spi)`

ref_freq

: Reference frequency of shape {code}`(source,)`

log_si

: Boolean indicated whether to use the logarithmic spectral index.

gauss_shape

: Gaussian shape parameters of shape {code}`(source, 3)`.
  The three components are MajorAxis, MinorAxis and Orientation,
  respectively.

classes.name: crystalball.logger_init.InterceptHandler
documentation: Intercept logging messages and reroute them to the loguru.
